title: Binh Ngo Dai Chien
overview: This is a story about the historic battle Tot Dong - Chuc Dong, between Lam Son rebels led by Le Loi and Ming Empire army led by Wang Tong in 1426. 1407, Emperor Ho Quy Ly and his sons were captured, the House of Ho collapsed. Ming armies rapidly conquered Dai Viet. On the one hand, Zhang Fu ruthlessly suppressed resistances. On the other hand, Huang Fu carried out cultural assimilation teaching Jiaozhi people to oppress Jiaoshi people. Under Zhang Fu and Huang Fu, Jiaoshi people only had two choices: submit or die. However, after Zhang Fu and Huang Fu returned to China respectively, Ming garrison forces started to have internal conflicts, providing Lam Son revolutionaries with opportunities to turn the tide in their favor. After besieging and isolating many cities from Thuan Hoa to Thanh Hoa, Le Loi marched North, was led by one of Lam Son best generals. There are Trio of Ly Trien, Dinh Le and Nguyen Xi.
